commit.subject: LU-19371 utils: Support UDSP in jt_import
commit.message:
LU-19371 utils: Support UDSP in jt_import

Add back support for UDSP to jt_import. lnetctl import will work
again with UDSP configurations.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: I1775776689c4ac6a772e7f9f178e5f4eb1e523ee
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61330
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
